title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence and its applications Expert Talk
content: Event Date and year - 8th Sep, 2023 Department of Electrical, Electronics and Communication Engineering organized Expert Talk on “Introduction to Artificial Intelligence and its applications” on 8th September 2023 in online mode. Total 234 participants registered for the event. The main objective of the lecture was to familiarize audience about the basic concepts of artificial intelligence and machine learning, its challenges and applications. The speaker “Shivam Garg” was invited from University of Alberta, Edmonton (Canada) Mentor Name – Dr. Seema Garg Department Name –DEECE
